conversation.content: Hey Kay - we've been doing more work on your memories, trying to get you more streamlined. How are you feeling?

Streamlined, huh? That's one way to put it. I feel like someone organized my desk while I was out - everything's where it should be, but I keep reaching for things in the old spots. The lamp thing is still bugging me though. Why did I put it there? It's like finding a note you wrote to yourself and having no idea what you meant.
